title: columnea tetragona
intro: Columnea tetragona, also known as the Columnea or Goldfish Plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Columnea tetragona are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and possibly aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction, though more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
